name: Ghost Charon, the Underworld Boatman
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>劫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>火</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>舟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ゴースト・カロン
name_jp_tl: Ghost Charon, the Hellfire Boat Guard
desc: If your opponent controls a monster, and you control no other monsters: You can target 1 Fusion Monster in your Graveyard; banish both this card from the field and that target, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Dragon-Type Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck whose Level equals the total Levels those 2 monsters had (original Level, if face-down). You can only use this effect of "Ghost Charon, the Underworld Boatman" once per turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except Dragon-Type monsters.
mnst_eff: If your opponent controls a monster, and you control no other monsters: You can target 1 Fusion Monster in your Graveyard; banish both this card from the field and that target, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Dragon-Type Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck whose Level equals the total Levels those 2 monsters had (original Level, if face-down). You can only use this effect of "Ghost Charon, the Underworld Boatman" once per turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except Dragon-Type monsters.
eff: If your opponent controls a monster, and you control no other monsters: You can target 1 Fusion Monster in your Graveyard; banish both this card from the field and that target, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Dragon-Type Synchro Monster from your Extra Deck whose Level equals the total Levels those 2 monsters had (original Level, if face-down). You can only use this effect of "Ghost Charon, the Underworld Boatman" once per turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except Dragon-Type monsters.

sets.set: Premium Gold: Return of the Bling

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
misc: Requires control of no other monsters
